result.stdout:
🔥 SharpFuse v0.1.2.0 — C# Source Fusion Tool

Usage:
  SharpFuse <inputDirectory> [outputFile] [--root=Namespace]

Examples:
  SharpFuse ../SharpFuse.Test --root=TestNs
    -> outputs to ../SharpFuse.Test/TestNs.cs

  SharpFuse ../SharpFuse.Test ../SharpFuse.Test/Merged.cs --root=TestNs
    -> outputs to ../SharpFuse.Test/Merged.cs
